props.title: ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket
props.description: logs/app.log, 2026-05-11 09:00–10:00 UTC, 22 ERROR lines out of 1042 requests

props.title: Spike at 09:30
props.body: 11 of 22 ERROR lines land in the 09:30 bucket, coinciding with a pricing upstream outage: repeated `econnrefused` failures, the circuit breaker opening (`circuit_opened`), and cascading `503`s on `/catalog`. Recovery begins around 09:36–09:40 as the breaker half-opens and closes.
